source_filing: U.S. Census Bureau, Income in the United States: 2024 (P60-286)
original_text: Median household income was $83,730 in 2024, not statistically different from the 2023 estimate of $82,690.
modified_text: U.S. real median household income was $83,730 in 2024, which was not statistically different from the 2023 estimate of $82,690.
claim: U.S. real median household income was $83,730 in 2024, statistically unchanged from 2023's $82,690.
citation_as_written: U.S. Census Bureau, Income in the United States: 2024 (P60-286)
notes: Faithful restatement of the official headline figure, the period (2024), and the 'not statistically different from 2023' qualifier, all matching the Census P60-286 report verbatim.
